This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which may help to alleviate symptoms of conditions like fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders. The bioactive constituents of Paypayrola bordenavei include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Paypayrola bordenavei is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used to make a tincture, allowing for its bioactive compounds to be utilized effectively in the treatment of various health conditions.
